$comment: Curated extension catalog (docs/EXTENSIONS-PLAN.md §6). Host this JSON in a registry repo (e.g. dream-extensions-catalog) and point EXT_CATALOG_URL at its raw URL — fork it to curate your own store. The five first-party extensions ship vendored; they appear here once ejected to their own repos.

extensions.name: Example Extension
extensions.description: What it does, in one line.
